tool: bibtexupdater (RAW bibtex-check tool only, NO prescreening/DOI-resolution layer)
source: data/v1.0/baseline_results/bibtexupdater_raw_dev_public.jsonl (released raw run, 1112/1119 keys; 7 missing -> conservative VALID)
WARNING: This RAW-tool-only recompute does NOT match the PUBLISHED bibtex-updater dev aggregate (published NEW DR .9686 / FPR .1930 = matrix 587/99/19/414; this raw recompute gives DR .9719 / FPR .1813 = 589/93/17/420). The ~6-FP gap is a network-bound layer (DOI-resolution prescreening or a non-archived run variant) not present in the raw file. Local year/author prescreen checks explain 0 of the 6. A fresh bibtex-check re-run is UNFAITHFUL (Semantic Scholar rate-limit: 8/12 probe entries timed out; 4/12 label agreement; ~90s/entry without S2 key; DB drift). Therefore these per-type DRs are offline-faithful to the RAW tool configuration ONLY and are NOT a drop-in for tab:codesign_pertype, whose cells must stay consistent with the published bibtex-updater aggregate. Provided for transparency, NOT for paper substitution. See todo_hard.json F5 documented_only.
